title: goniocheton lenticellatus
intro: Goniocheton lenticellatus, also known as Goniocheton, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Goniocheton include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Traditionally, Goniocheton is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to the affected area.
